movies.title: The Last Viking
movies.description: Mads Mikkelsen is back in a wild, bloody Danish dark comedy — just dropped!
movies.overview: After serving fourteen years for robbery, Anker is released from prison and reunites with his mentally ill brother Manfred, who alone knows where the stolen money is hidden but has forgotten its location, sending them on a journey to recover the loot and confront who they are.

movies.title: Ladies First
movies.description: Sacha Baron Cohen's gender-swapped comedy has the internet absolutely divided — stream it now
movies.overview: An arrogant but charismatic ladies' man finds his life of money, power and casual flings upended when he wakes up in a parallel world dominated by women.

movies.title: The Stranger
movies.description: François Ozon's polarizing Camus adaptation is generating massive cultural and political debates
movies.overview: Algiers, 1938. Meursault, a quiet and unassuming employee in his early thirties, attends his mother's funeral without shedding a tear. The next day, he begins a casual affair with Marie, a work colleague. He quickly slips back into his usual routine.

movies.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
movies.description: Chris Pratt goes cosmic in this massive, family-friendly box office champion
movies.overview: Having thwarted Bowser's previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr., who is determined to liberate his father from captivity and restore the family legacy. Alongside companions new and old, the brothers travel across the stars to stop the young heir's crusade.

movies.title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy
movies.description: Unbelievably gruesome body horror that's testing the limits of horror fans everywhere
movies.overview: The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace—eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as what should be a joyful reunion turns into a living nightmare.

movies.title: Normal
movies.description: John Wick meets small-town secrets — Bob Odenkirk kicks absolute ass in this thriller
movies.overview: An unassuming substitute sheriff with a troubled past responds to a bank robbery in a small, sleepy town and unknowingly uncovers something far more explosive.

movies.title: Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War
movies.description: John Krasinski returns in a pulse-pounding, high-stakes military thriller that just dropped
movies.overview: Jack Ryan is reluctantly pulled back into espionage when an international covert mission unravels a deadly conspiracy. Racing against time, he joins CIA allies Mike November & James Greer and sharp MI6 officer Emma Marlowe to battle a rogue black-ops unit in a high-stakes, deeply personal fight.

movies.title: Project Hail Mary
movies.description: Ryan Gosling and an alien buddy save Earth — the year's best sci-fi epic
movies.overview: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction.

movies.title: The Punisher: One Last Kill
movies.description: Jon Bernthal's brutal return as Frank Castle is trending everywhere on Disney+
movies.overview: As Frank Castle searches for meaning beyond revenge, an unexpected force pulls him back into the fight.

movies.title: The Drama
movies.description: Zendaya and Robert Pattinson in a twisted A24 comedy that has Letterboxd reeling
movies.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

movies.title: Ready or Not: Here I Come
movies.description: Samara Weaving is back for more gory, hilarious wedding-night survival mayhem
movies.overview: Moments after surviving an all-out attack from the Le Domas family, Grace discovers she’s reached the next level of the nightmarish game — and this time with her estranged sister Faith at her side. Grace has one chance to survive, keep her sister alive, and claim the High Seat of the Council that controls the world. Four rival families are hunting her for the throne, and whoever wins rules it all.

movies.title: Scream 7
movies.description: The year's most controversial movie — see what has everyone boycotting and arguing
movies.overview: When a new Ghostface killer emerges in the quiet town where Sidney Prescott has built a new life, her darkest fears are realized as her daughter becomes the next target. Determined to protect her family, Sidney must face the horrors of her past to put an end to the bloodshed once and for all.

movies.title: Swapped
movies.description: Michael B. Jordan and Juno Temple swap bodies in Skydance's first true animated masterpiece
movies.overview: A small woodland creature and a majestic bird, two natural sworn enemies of the Valley, magically trade places and set off on an adventure of a lifetime to switch back. Their journey soon uncovers a greater threat—one that could endanger not only their species, but the entire valley they call home.

movies.title: My Dearest Assassin
movies.description: Tense, highly-rated romantic thriller that has fans raving about its incredible action chemistry
movies.overview: Hunted for her rare blood type, a caged woman vows to fight alongside the assassin she loves to protect their future when an old enemy resurfaces.

movies.title: Marty Supreme
movies.description: Timothée Chalamet's unhinged ping-pong odyssey is an absolute A24 masterpiece
movies.overview: Marty Mauser, a young man with a dream no one respects, goes to hell and back in pursuit of greatness.

movies.title: Avatar: Fire and Ash
movies.description: James Cameron's gorgeous blockbuster epic that everyone needs to experience
movies.overview: In the wake of the devastating war against the RDA and the loss of their eldest son, Jake Sully and Neytiri face a new threat on Pandora: the Ash People, a violent and power-hungry Na'vi tribe led by the ruthless Varang. Jake's family must fight for their survival and the future of Pandora in a conflict that pushes them to their emotional and physical limits.

movies.title: Hoppers
movies.description: Pixar's wildly inventive animal sci-fi adventure is a heartfelt hit for all ages
movies.overview: Scientists have discovered how to 'hop' human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals, allowing people to communicate with animals as animals. Animal lover Mabel seizes an opportunity to use the technology, uncovering mysteries within the animal world beyond anything she could have imagined.

movies.title: Accidental Partners
movies.description: A super fun rom-com that's currently dominating streaming charts worldwide
movies.overview: Two women discover they were both scammed by the same man (who also got them pregnant). They form an alliance to take revenge.

movies.title: Remarkably Bright Creatures
movies.description: Sally Field and a clever octopus in the year's most charming feel-good movie
movies.overview: Through unlikely bonds formed during night shifts at a local aquarium, Tova, an elderly widow, learns of a life-changing discovery that may bring her joy and wonder once again.

movies.title: Send Help
movies.description: Sam Raimi is back with an incredibly tense, comedic horror survival thriller
movies.overview: Two colleagues become stranded on a deserted island, the only survivors of a plane crash. On the island, they must overcome past grievances and work together to survive, but ultimately, it's a battle of wills and wits to make it out alive.

movies.title: Crime 101
movies.description: Chris Hemsworth and Mark Ruffalo clash in this sleek, star-studded heist thriller
movies.overview: When an elusive thief whose high-stakes heists unfold along the iconic 101 freeway in Los Angeles eyes the score of a lifetime, with hopes of this being his final job, his path collides with a disillusioned insurance broker who is facing her own crossroads. Determined to crack the case, a relentless detective closes in on the operation, raising the stakes even higher.

movies.title: They Will Kill You
movies.description: A wild, gory horror-comedy about a housekeeper navigating a murderous cult
movies.overview: A woman answers a help wanted ad to be a housekeeper in a mysterious New York City high-rise, unaware that she is entering a community that has seen a number of disappearances over the years and may be under the grip of a Satanic cult.

movies.title: Apex
movies.description: Charlize Theron does what she does best in this relentless, high-octane survival thriller
movies.overview: A grieving woman pushing her limits on a solo adventure in the Australian wild is ensnared in a twisted game with a cunning killer who thinks she's prey.

movies.title: Vengeance
movies.description: Tense and gritty Mexican action-thriller that's perfect for action junkies tonight
movies.overview: The brutal murder of the wife of “Toro,” a military hero in the special forces, turns him into a man with a single purpose: revenge. After a stroke of fate makes him a millionaire, Carlos transforms his fortune into an arsenal and, together with his closest soldiers, sets out to hunt down those responsible.

movies.title: Reminders of Him
movies.description: Maika Monroe shines in this emotional, tear-jerking adaptation of Colleen Hoover's bestseller
movies.overview: When Diem's custodial grandparents adamantly refuse Kenna's attempts to see her daughter, Kenna discovers unexpected compassion, and then something truer and deeper, with former NFL player and local bar owner Ledger. As their secret romance develops, so do the dangers for both of them, leading Kenna toward heartbreak and, ultimately, the hope for a second chance.

movies.title: Alpha
movies.description: Julia Ducournau's bizarre, stylish sci-fi body horror is definitely not for the squeamish
movies.overview: Alpha, a troubled 13-year-old lives with her single mom. Their world collapses the day she returns from school with a tattoo on her arm.

movies.title: undertone
movies.description: Creepy, atmospheric indie horror that's quietly building a major cult following online
movies.overview: The host of a popular paranormal podcast becomes haunted by terrifying recordings mysteriously sent her way.

movies.title: Roommates
movies.description: A light, breezy Gen-Z comedy that delivers some surprisingly solid laughs
movies.overview: When shy college freshman Devon asks cool-girl Celeste to be her roommate, a blossoming friendship quickly spirals into a war of passive aggression.

movies.description: A gritty South African thriller full of unexpected twists and high-stakes tension
movies.overview: When an unexpected road rage incident puts his son in critical condition, an enraged father spirals down a dark path of emotional turmoil and vengeance.

movies.title: Balls Up
movies.description: Mark Wahlberg and Paul Walter Hauser in a chaotic, buddy comedy riot
movies.overview: Two marketing executives go "balls out" and pitch a bold full‑coverage condom sponsorship with the World Cup. After their drunken celebration in Brazil sparks a global scandal, they must outrun furious fans, criminals, and power-hungry officials to salvage their careers and make it home alive.

movies.title: Outcome
movies.description: Keanu Reeves and Jonah Hill team up in this divisive, star-powered Hollywood satire
movies.overview: Reef Hawk, Hollywood's poster child since age six, is not okay. When he learns about an extortion plot tied to a mysterious video, Reef preemptively sets out on a redemption tour to make amends, confront his demons, and avoid getting canceled.

movies.title: Pillion
movies.description: Alexander Skarsgård and Harry Melling in a bizarre, queer leather-subculture romance
movies.overview: Colin, a timid gay man, is swept off his feet when Ray, an enigmatic and impossibly handsome biker, takes him on as his submissive in a crazy and erotic BDSM-focused relationship.

movies.title: The Voice of Hind Rajab
movies.description: Devastating, urgent, and incredibly powerful — a masterpiece of modern political cinema
movies.overview: January 29, 2024. Red Crescent volunteers receive an emergency call. A five-year old girl is trapped in a car under fire in Gaza, pleading for rescue. While trying to keep her on the line, they do everything they can to get an ambulance to her. Her name was Hind Rajab.

movies.title: Sirāt
movies.description: Oliver Laxe's beautiful, slow-burn Spanish neo-noir is a stunning, atmospheric thriller
movies.overview: A man and his son arrive at a rave lost in the mountains of Morocco. They are looking for Marina, their daughter and sister, who disappeared months ago at another rave. Driven by fate, they decide to follow a group of ravers in search of one last party, in hopes Marina will be there.

movies.title: Redux Redux
movies.description: A trippy, mind-bending sci-fi thriller that will keep you guessing until the end
movies.overview: In an attempt to avenge her daughter’s death, Irene Kelly travels through parallel universes, killing her daughter’s murderer again and again. As she becomes consumed by vengeance, her humanity begins to slip away—until the cycle is disrupted when she rescues Mia, a sharp-witted teenager already marked by the killer.

movies.title: GOAT
movies.description: A vibrant, fun sports animation featuring Stephen Curry that's perfect for families
movies.overview: A small goat with big dreams gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball, a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world.

movies.title: Father Mother Sister Brother
movies.description: Jim Jarmusch's quirky, slow-paced comedy starring Adam Driver and Tom Waits
movies.overview: Estranged siblings reunite after years apart, forced to confront unresolved tensions and reevaluate their strained relationships with their emotionally distant parents.

movies.title: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man
movies.description: Cillian Murphy returns for one final, smoke-filled chapter of peaky violence
movies.overview: After his estranged son gets embroiled in a Nazi plot, self-exiled gangster Tommy Shelby must return to Birmingham to save his family — and his nation.

movies.title: The Forbidden City
movies.description: A visually gorgeous, action-packed fantasy romance set in a striking mythic world
movies.overview: The son of an indebted restaurant owner joins a foreign girl in search of her sister. Together, they’ll have to fight side by side against the most ruthless members of the Roman criminal underworld.

movies.title: The Testament of Ann Lee
movies.description: Amanda Seyfried is fantastic in this mesmerizing, stylish historical drama
movies.overview: The extraordinary true legend of Ann Lee, founder of the devotional sect known as the Shakers, who preached gender and social equality and was revered by her followers as the female Christ.

movies.title: Little Amélie or the Character of Rain
movies.description: A heartwarming and beautifully animated family drama that will charm everyone
movies.overview: The world is a perplexing, peaceful mystery to Amélie until a miraculous encounter with chocolate ignites her wild sense of curiosity. As she develops a deep attachment to her family's housekeeper, Nishio-san, Amélie discovers the wonders of nature as well as the emotional truths hidden beneath the surface of her family's idyllic life as foreigners in post-war Japan.

movies.title: No Other Choice
movies.description: Park Chan-wook delivers another brilliantly dark, twisted thriller full of stellar performances
movies.overview: After being laid off and humiliated by a ruthless job market, a veteran paper mill manager descends into violence in a desperate bid to reclaim his dignity.

movies.title: Hamnet
movies.description: Chloe Zhao's gorgeously shot, poetic Shakespearean drama starring Paul Mescal
movies.overview: The powerful story of love and loss that inspired the creation of Shakespeare's timeless masterpiece, Hamlet.

movies.title: The Secret Agent
movies.description: Wagner Moura stars in this incredibly tense, atmospheric Brazilian historical crime thriller
movies.overview: Brazil, 1977. Marcelo, a technology expert in his early 40s, is on the run. Hoping to reunite with his son, he travels to Recife during Carnival but soon realizes that the city is not the safe haven he was expecting.
production_companies: Banco Regional de Desenvolvimento do Extremo Sul

movies.title: Arco
movies.description: A gorgeously unique French sci-fi animation that's a true feast for the eyes
movies.overview: Ten-year-old Arco lives in a far future. During his first flight in his rainbow suit, he loses control and falls into the past. Iris, a girl his age from 2075, comes to his rescue and tries by any means to help send him back to his own era.

movies.title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
movies.description: Nia DaCosta breathes terrifying new life into the iconic post-apocalyptic franchise
movies.overview: Dr. Kelson finds himself in a shocking new relationship - with consequences that could change the world as they know it - and Spike's encounter with Jimmy Crystal becomes a nightmare he can't escape.

movies.title: Even If This Love Disappears Tonight
movies.description: A sweeping, heartbreaking Korean romance that is guaranteed to make you cry
movies.overview: A high school girl wakes up each day with no memory of yesterday. When she agrees to date a shy classmate, can their love grow with every new beginning?

movies.title: Is This Thing On?
movies.description: Bradley Cooper directs and co-stars in this charming, bittersweet comedy-drama
movies.overview: As their marriage quietly unravels, Alex faces middle age and an impending divorce, seeking new purpose in the New York comedy scene while Tess confronts the sacrifices she made for their family—forcing them to navigate co-parenting, identity, and whether love can take a new form.

movies.title: Good Luck, Have Fun, Don't Die
movies.description: Sam Rockwell shines in this chaotic, fast-paced sci-fi action comedy
movies.overview: A 'Man from the Future' arrives at an LA diner where he must recruit the precise combination of disgruntled patrons to join him on a one-night quest to save the world from the terminal threat of a rogue artificial intelligence.

movies.title: Cold Storage
movies.description: Joe Keery battles a deadly fungus in this fun, gross-out horror comedy
movies.overview: When a mutating, highly contagious fungus escapes a sealed facility, two employees – joined by a grizzled bioterror operative – must survive the wildest night shift ever to save humanity from extinction.

movies.title: Humint
movies.description: A slick, action-packed Korean espionage thriller starring Zo In-sung
movies.overview: A South Korean agent hunts a drug ring in Russia and goes head-to-head with a North Korean operative — pulling both into peril and tangled secrets.

movies.title: Dhurandhar
movies.description: A massive, high-octane Bollywood crime epic that's sweeping global audiences
movies.overview: A mysterious traveler slips into the heart of Karachi's underbelly and rises through its ranks with lethal precision, only to tear the notorious ISI-Underworld nexus apart from within.

movies.title: Mike & Nick & Nick & Alice
movies.description: Vince Vaughn is incredibly funny in this wacky, high-concept sci-fi comedy
movies.overview: Two gangsters and the woman they love try to survive the most dangerous night of their lives. As if that wasn’t enough, there’s one wild ingredient added to the mix: a time machine.

movies.title: We Bury the Dead
movies.description: Daisy Ridley anchors a dark, highly atmospheric post-apocalyptic survival horror
movies.overview: After a catastrophic military disaster, the dead don't just rise - they hunt. Ava searches for her missing husband, but what she finds is far more terrifying.

movies.title: Dead Man's Wire
movies.description: Gus Van Sant's sleek and moody crime thriller featuring Bill Skarsgård
movies.overview: In 1977, former real estate developer Tony Kiritsis puts a dead man's switch on himself and the mortgage banker who did him wrong, demanding $5 million and a personal apology.

movies.title: Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere
movies.description: A fascinating, deeply uncomfortable dive into the internet's most toxic corners
movies.overview: With rare access and no holds barred, the acclaimed documentarian investigates a growing ultra-masculine network and its controversial influencers.

movies.title: Feel My Voice
movies.description: A charming Italian musical comedy-drama with tons of heart and catchy tunes
movies.overview: A teenager, the only hearing member of a deaf family, finds her voice and learns to believe in herself through her passion for singing.

movies.title: Agent Zeta
movies.description: A sleek and tense Spanish action thriller starring Mario Casas
movies.overview: Four Spanish ex-intelligence officers are assassinated simultaneously worldwide. The CNI discovers all participated in the covert "Operation Ciénaga" decades ago in Colombia. Zeta, the CNI's best operative, must hunt and protect the sole survivor, facing his deadliest global mission yet. Top Colombian agent Alfa will join Zeta, seemingly knowing more about "Ciénaga"'s secrets than him.

movies.title: War Machine
movies.description: Alan Ritchson brings massive brute force to this loud and explosive sci-fi actioner
movies.overview: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

movies.title: Solo Mio
movies.description: Kevin James heads to Italy in this simple, breezy romantic comedy
movies.overview: After Matt's dreams of a picturesque Italian wedding are shattered when his fiancée leaves him at the altar, he embarks on his planned honeymoon across Italy alone, immersing himself in the country's vibrant culture, food, and beauty, meeting Gia along the way.
